title: Token-2022 transfer-fee redemption requests record gross amount while vault receives net amount, causing stuck redemptions

solana_evidence.poc_command: ANCHOR_PROVIDER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8897 ANCHOR_WALLET=/tmp/onre-upgrade-authority.json corepack pnpm exec vitest run tests/redemption/token2022_transfer_fee_poc.validator.spec.ts --reporter=verbose --pool=forks --maxWorkers=1 --minWorkers=1

root_cause: Offer execution rejects Token-2022 transfer-fee mints before token operations.
Redemption request creation accepts a Token-2022 transfer-fee token_in and calls transfer_checked for the requested gross amount.
The Token-2022 vault receives amount minus transfer fee, but RedemptionRequest.amount and RedemptionOffer.requested_redemptions record the original gross amount.
Cancel and fulfillment paths later use the recorded gross amount, so the request can become impossible to cancel or fulfill from the net-funded vault.
reproduction_steps: Build the pinned OnRe program and start solana-test-validator with the program loaded as upgradeable.
Create a Token-2022 ONyc mint with a 5% transfer fee and create a standard SPL USDC mint.
Initialize OnRe, create an offer, add an offer vector, and create a redemption offer whose token_in is the fee-bearing Token-2022 mint.
Mint 100000000000 units of the fee-bearing Token-2022 mint to a redeemer.
Attempt cancel_redemption_request and observe rejection because the vault cannot return the recorded gross amount.
mitigation: Apply the same Token-2022 transfer-fee rejection used in offer execution to redemption token_in paths.
Alternatively, measure pre/post vault balances and record the net amount actually received, then ensure all cancel and fulfillment accounting uses that net amount.

false_positive_checks.cancel_failure_reason: passed: token-program insufficient funds/custom program error family
false_positive_checks.fulfill_failure_reason: passed: token-program insufficient funds/custom program error family
false_positive_checks.top_up_control: passed: after topping up the 5000000000 deficit, cancel closes but redeemer receives only 95000000000
false_positive_checks.dumped_deployed_binary_replay: passed: mainnet dumped binary sha256 abcea77d935ca5eb512f43a1b3a6241151c2efa74c80b7bd9a600b959f65f7d6 reproduced the PoC and controls under local validator

production_exposure_caveat: Read-only mainnet config check observed SPL Token ONyc and no active fee-bearing Token-2022 redemption token_in among two fetched redemption offers. The bug is confirmed in deployed code, but current live exploitability appears configuration/governance-dependent unless a fee-bearing Token-2022 redemption token_in is or becomes enabled.
